738166.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_A
738166.transcript: Stay focused on the path ahead!

jp.text: 何が…起きようとしている…
ガランツァ将軍に続くぞ！

6466528.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0200
6466528.transcript: There is much akin in our swordplay.

jp.text: カタリナ殿の技には、どこか通じるものを感じる。
jp.literal: I sense something familiar in your techniques, Katalina.

11933340.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0100
11933340.transcript: Don't worry, this is pacing myself.

jp.text: 背中は俺が守る。思いっきり行ってこい！
jp.literal: I'll cover your back. Go for it with everything you've got!

19882122.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0400
19882122.transcript: Indeed. The rearguard is safe with you.

jp.text: ああ、光栄はイオ殿に任せよ。
jp.literal: Ah, leave the honor to you, Io.

26172267.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0900
26172267.transcript: With you around, I can take on anything!

jp.text: 頼りにしているからな
バイスフリューゲル！砕けろ！

29196431.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0700
29196431.transcript: Even the dead act with valor.

jp.text: ユーレイの仲間がこんなに頼もしいとはな
jp.literal: I never thought a ghostly ally could be so reliable.

jp.text: いいコンビネーションだった
ロゼッタ殿がスキを作ってくれたおかげだ
jp.literal: Thanks to you, Rosetta, for creating the opening.

32605201.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1900
32605201.transcript: I am grateful for the aid.

jp.text: 合わせてくれて助かったよ
jp.literal: Thanks for syncing up. I owe you one.

33447501.label: PL0800_vo_NAV_get_snp_1
33447501.transcript: Ah, I'll have to think of a name for you.

jp.text: 提督に保護しなければ！
jp.literal: I must protect you at all costs.

38398223.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_3st_2_FIRST
38398223.transcript: We shall see whose fangs are sharper, Icy Wolf!

jp.text: 銀狼か…我が氷の双剣には、どこまで通用する。
jp.literal: Silver Dragon... how far will my sword of ice cut through?

39298606.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1800
39298606.transcript: Come. There are still battles to be fought.

jp.literal: Alright, let's prepare for what comes next.
I'll take the next one too!

43267461.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_4_A
43267461.transcript: Our foe is fast, but it's no match for us!

jp.text: 素早い相手だが、捉えられぬわけでもない

jp.literal: I won't let you escape this time!

45796496.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0500
45796496.transcript: We mustn't think we've won yet.

jp.text: まだ油断してはいけないな
jp.literal: We can't afford to be careless yet.

47895980.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_win_3
47895980.transcript: After this, it's back to training.

jp.text: まだまだ。鍛錬あるのみだ！
すまない！挽回してみせる！
jp.literal: I'm sorry. I'll make it up to you.

jp.text: なんとしても、必ずここで！
jp.literal: I must, I will, right here!
I'll show you what I'm made of!

jp.text: ヴェイン、気を抜くなよ！

68531780.label: PL0800_vo_SP_charge_speak_1
68531780.transcript: You face the bite of the white dragon's!

jp.text: 白龍騎士団の誇りにかけて！
jp.literal: For the pride of the White Dragon Knights!
I still can't afford to be careless.

71691456.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1800
71691456.transcript: I am not versed in alchemy, but your power is unmistakable.

jp.text: 連金術には疎いが、相当に練り上げられているのはわかる
jp.literal: I'm no expert on alchemy, but I can tell this is quite the concoction.

74023942.label: PL0800_vo_DUO_rescue1_A_PL1000
74023942.transcript: Do you want to turn back?

83735252.label: PL0800_vo_DUO_recovery_C_PL1000
83735252.transcript: I'm sorry. It won't happen again.

jp.literal: I'm sorry. I'm glad you're okay.

85561614.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_1st_1_FIRST
85561614.transcript: A primal that controls wind... A formidable foe indeed.

jp.text: 風を操る聖書獣。強敵だな。
jp.literal: Wind-wielding holy swordsman. A formidable foe.

jp.text: しっかりしてください！

100071662.label: PL0800_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_B
100071662.transcript: They're growing desperate! Be on guard!

jp.text: 空気が変わった！仕掛けてくるぞ！
jp.literal: The air has changed. I'm going to set a trap.

jp.text: 俺たちの連携を見せてやろ！
いかがだ！マギラフリラ将軍！

117107559.label: PL0800_vo_ETC_quest_start_3
117107559.transcript: We go into the viper's nest. Take care.

jp.text:
気を抜かずにいこう！
よし！
jp.literal: Let's go without letting our guard down. Alright!

121040875.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1400
121040875.transcript: You are no less honorable than I, Narmaya.

jp.text: ナルメア、殿こそ見事だった！

121384676.label: PL0800_vo_DUO_recovery_B_PL1100
121384676.transcript: I hope I'm not a burden.

jp.text: ジークフリート。俺のために。すみません。
jp.literal: I'm sorry... for what I did to you.

jp.text: ありがとう。いい支援だった。
jp.literal: Thanks. That was a good support.

jp.text: 隙を逃すわけにはいかないからな
jp.literal: I can't afford to miss this opening.

jp.text: 常在戦場、抜かりはない！

133576592.label: PL0800_vo_ETC_lockon_1
133576592.transcript: I am Lancelot, captain of the White Dragons!

jp.text: 白龍騎士団団長、ランスロット！参る！
jp.literal: White Dragon Knights Commander, Lancelot! Miles!

140926175.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B
140926175.transcript: No matter what dangers lie ahead, we'll be ready.

jp.text: ああ、この調子で行こう！
jp.literal: Ah, let's keep this momentum going!

jp.text: これ以上好きにはさせん!
jp.literal: I won't let you go any further!

jp.text: さすがです！ジークフリートさん！
オイゲン殿、人をからかうのもほどほどに願いたい。
jp.literal: Eugen, I'd appreciate it if you'd refrain from teasing people too much.

jp.text: ありがとうございます

166842824.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1400
166842824.transcript: Your sword moves too fast for the eye to follow.

jp.text: 鋭い一閃、実に見事だった
さあ、かかって来るがいい！
ブルー・デトネーション！

190388905.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_pose_1
190388905.transcript: The white dragons fight for honor!

jp.text: 白龍騎士団の誇りにかけて！
jp.literal: The White Dragon Knights! For honor!

194750811.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1000
194750811.transcript: Come now, we're old brothers in arms.

jp.text: おれがそんなヘマをするとでも？
jp.literal: Heh heh... You think I'd make such a rookie mistake?

199870989.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_3
199870989.transcript: Yes. Focus on the dangers ahead.

200541254.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0100
200541254.transcript: I knew I could depend on you.

jp.literal: Looks like I'm being saved again.

208243597.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0900
208243597.transcript: It's not yet time to celebrate, Vane.

jp.text: 気を抜くなよ、ヴェイン。
jp.literal: Don't let your guard down, Vane.

211475130.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
211475130.transcript: I'd be honored to train together when there's time.

jp.text: どうかんだな。訓練ならばいつでも付き合う。
jp.literal: You're a good comrade. If it's training, I'll always be there for you.

jp.text: シードホルム城を奪還する！
jp.literal: I'll take back the Seed of Holmshjort!

214725128.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0600
214725128.transcript: I'd be honored to coordinate another attack.

jp.text: ムロンだ！俺が先陣を切ろう！
jp.literal: Of course. I'll clear the path ahead!

218354785.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_C_3
218354785.transcript: Come what may, we will prevail!

jp.text: 俺たちの力、見せてやろ！

jp.literal: I'll return this debt with my sword!

jp.text: ここから攻めに転じる！
jp.literal: I'll take the offensive from here!

244768973.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_1_A
244768973.transcript: The evil these weapons could wrought!

jp.text: このような機械兵器まで持ち込むとは
jp.literal: To bring in weapons of war like this...

jp.text: 勝ち目は必ずあるはずさ！
jp.literal: There must be a way to win!

258262747.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_C
258262747.transcript: It's horrifying, but we've survived far worse!

jp.text: 得体の知れない相手だが、負けはしない！
jp.literal: I don't know what you are, but I won't lose!

258432813.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_win_4
258432813.transcript: Hail to Fiendrock and her stately king!

jp.text: この勝利を祖国に捧げよう！
jp.literal: I dedicate this victory to my homeland!

264104654.label: PL0800_vo_DUO_rescue2_B_PL0900
264104654.transcript: You always take care of me.

jp.text: フォローありがとうございます！

266790013.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
266790013.transcript: Your sword could cut through the greatest boulder!

jp.text: 開闘乱馬を立つとは、まさにこのことか！
jp.literal: To stand against the ice king... this is exactly what I'm talking about!

jp.text: ありがとう、パーシヴァル。

271270180.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1300
271270180.transcript: I'd like to hear what you think of my technique.

jp.text: おれの二刀流、是非ともオキナに見定めてもらいたいものだ
jp.literal: My two swords... I'd be honored if you'd witness them.

285186015.label: PL0800_vo_SP_charge_speak_3
285186015.transcript: Upheld by fangs of gleaming ice!

jp.text: 我が双剣の極意を見よ！
jp.literal: Behold the pinnacle of my swordsmanship!
I'm sorry for always being a bother.

286220422.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_C
286220422.transcript: Now! Let us conclude this farce!

jp.text: パーシヴァル、立てるか？
常に学び、成長せねばな。
jp.literal: I must always learn and grow.

288091243.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
288091243.transcript: We have the upper hand! Now use it!

jp.text: 俺たちが優勢だ！行けるぞ！
jp.literal: We've got the upper hand! Let's go!

jp.text: エンテイのチカラ、ウケトッタ！
jp.literal: I've received the power of the infinite!
I'll decide it all at once!

303491011.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0100
303491011.transcript: I see you still have strength left for humor.

jp.text: 勢いづいてきたな、団長。
ナラクノフォールダウン！
jp.literal: Fall Down of the Nine Paths!

307614290.label: PL0800_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1100_1
307614290.transcript: Siegfried! That was quite the blow!

jp.text: 大丈夫ですか、ジークフリートさん！

310222938.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_win_12
310222938.transcript: Hmph. May Fiendrock's beauty never fade.

jp.text: ふっ、祖国を栄光に導かん！
jp.literal: I shall lead my homeland to glory!

310294267.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_4st_1_FIRST
310294267.transcript: Sega Grande has its charms, but the battles...

jp.text: ゼーガグランデ！いい空域だと思うが！
jp.literal: Zega Grande. I think it's a good area.

313335150.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1200
313335150.transcript: Indeed. None can prevail against our might.

jp.text: 次もこの調子でいこう！

jp.literal: I won't let this end yet!

jp.text: なあ、おかげで冷静になれた
jp.literal: Thanks to you, I was able to calm down.

jp.text: カオスデトネーション！

333632970.label: PL0800_vo_DUO_recovery_C_PL1100
333632970.transcript: I must rise to the challenge.

jp.literal: I'll turn this adversity into strength!
...I still have a long way to go.
I won't stand still. I'll cut through you!

349253358.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1300
349253358.transcript: Then I shall be your willing student.

jp.text: これが、極みに至ったオキナの剣技。参考にさせてもらおう！
jp.literal: This is the ultimate swordsmanship of the greatsword. Allow me to reference it.

350312140.label: PL0800_vo_ETC_quest_start_1
350312140.transcript: I'll clear a path. Stay close.

jp.text: 俺が道を切り開く！ついてきてくれ！
jp.literal: I'll clear the way! Follow me!

jp.text: シャルロッテ殿とは息が合うな。
jp.literal: You're quite compatible with her, aren't you?
Alright! Let's hurry to the back!

375089566.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1600
375089566.transcript: Let us turn up the pressure!

379107335.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1600
379107335.transcript: Hah! I won't say no to a challenge!

jp.text: ならば、次は競争と行こう
jp.literal: Then let's go to the next level of competition.

jp.text: しっかりしろ、ヴェイン！

384168739.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1600
384168739.transcript: I've had practice fighting with flame wielders.

jp.text: 炎と氷の連携は慣れている
jp.literal: I'm used to the combination of flame and ice.

386636288.label: PL0800_vo_ATK_ability_8_3
386636288.transcript: Can you best what you can't hit?

jp.text: 当たらなければ問題ない！
jp.literal: It's fine as long as it doesn't hit!

jp.text: はっ！手出しはさせない！
jp.literal: I won't let you get the upper hand!

388755533.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1700
388755533.transcript: I suspect this is why people fear you.

jp.text: チキセマルトハマサニコノコトカ
jp.literal: So this is what it means to be a true commander.

jp.text: こっちだ！みんな来てくれ！
jp.literal: Here I go! Everyone, come on!
Everyone, don't let your guard down!
No need to worry about it.

jp.text: リリス！貴様の企ててもここまでだ！
ありがとうな、パーシヴァル。

415937173.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500
415937173.transcript: I've still got a long way to go.

jp.text: 俺ももっと精進しなければな
jp.literal: I need to be more focused too.

jp.text: これがオーガマグロウノスの一撃か
jp.literal: So this is the mighty Grounus's strike?

jp.text: よし！攻撃の手を緩めるな！
jp.literal: Alright! Don't let up on the offense!

jp.text: フェンドラケに栄光あれ！

435475450.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_2_FIRST
435475450.transcript: Protect Historia! We must buy her time!

jp.text: イストリアス殿の栄昇完了まで援護！敵を近づけるな！
jp.literal: I'll cover for you until the Estorias Lord's victory is confirmed! Don't let the enemy get close!

439955387.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
439955387.transcript: Yes. There's much we can learn from each other.

jp.text: それはこちらこそだ。カタリナ殿から学べることはとても多い。
jp.literal: That's what I should be saying. There's so much I can learn from you, Katalina.

441967188.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1200
441967188.transcript: Come! We mustn't slow our pace!

jp.literal: Alright, let's prepare for the next one!

444297649.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1500
444297649.transcript: No wonder they tell legends about you.

jp.text: これが伝説の大剣豪の技か！
jp.literal: So this is the technique of the legendary great swordsmen?

jp.text: イド。彼は何を考えている。
くっ…決して屈じけるな！

453013430.label: PL0800_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL0900
453013430.transcript: What would I do without you?

jp.text: 形がない！ガンダゴウザ殿！

456463173.label: PL0800_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL0900_3
456463173.transcript: Right! I'm back in fighting shape!

jp.text: よし！気合い入れて行こう！

461946158.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
461946158.transcript: You are a born blade master.

jp.text: ジークフリートさんのおかげです！

472781833.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_A
472781833.transcript: Your tricks will work no longer!

jp.text: 同じ要領で、次も仕掛けるぞ！
jp.literal: Same capacity, I'll set the next one too!

jp.text: 守りを崩させてもらう！
jp.literal: I'll let you break my defense.

486840341.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1200
486840341.transcript: Now's the time to fulfill our oaths and prove our valor!

jp.text: 我らが騎士道、ここに示したり！
jp.literal: We knights of the realm shall show you!

jp.text: ああ、チータみたいだな
jp.literal: Ah, looks like I'm being targeted.

495905405.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_win_8
495905405.transcript: Our armor is valor. Our strength our bond.

jp.text: これが俺たちの戦い方だ！
jp.literal: This is our way of fighting!

jp.text: みんな、いい連携だった！
jp.literal: Everyone, that was a great link!

498575981.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0700
498575981.transcript: Seems my training has paid off.

jp.text: これも日々の鍛錬の成果だ！
jp.literal: It's all thanks to my daily training.

498682585.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_pose_5
498682585.transcript: Remember, haste and speed are not the same.

jp.text: アセリは禁物だ。慎重に進もう。
jp.literal: Haste is a burden. Let us proceed with caution.

503384471.label: PL0800_vo_NAV_get_snp_2
503384471.transcript: I found you, my good fellow!

505132551.label: PL0800_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL1000_3
505132551.transcript: I'll repay this debt one day.

506081511.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0700
506081511.transcript: I see. Attack in waves and wear down their defenses.

jp.text: 多数の手勢による波状攻撃か
jp.literal: A barrage of attacks from numerous enemies?

jp.text: 同じ鉄を踏むわけにはいかない！
jp.literal: I can't tread the same path!

jp.text: まだ気を抜かずにいこう

514436903.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_1st_1_FIRST
514436903.transcript: Take heart, everyone. Who knows what lurks here?

jp.text: 何が起きるか分からない。慎重に行こう。
jp.literal: I don't know what's going to happen. Let's be careful.

jp.text: 先へ進ませてもらおう！イド！
jp.literal: I'll go ahead and charge forward!

518474630.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0500
518474630.transcript: I'd say the same about you, if I had a beard.

jp.text: オイゲン殿もさすがの腕前だ
jp.literal: Eugen, your skill is as impressive as ever.

519300436.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_FIRST
519300436.transcript: We are more than a suitable match!

jp.text: 相手にとって不測の事態だ！
当たれば無事では済まないか
jp.literal: If it hits, it's not over yet!

jp.text: ああ、このまま押し切るぞ！

537409015.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0500
537409015.transcript: Not a bullet missed its mark!

jp.text: オイゲン！ここだと思ったところに銃弾が飛んでくる！
jp.literal: Amazing... I thought I was safe here, and bullets are flying everywhere.

539491994.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_C
539491994.transcript: Continue the assault! We must prevail!

jp.text: 攻め続けよう！それしかない！
jp.literal: Let's keep pressing forward! That's our only option!

jp.text: よし！一歩ずつ確実に進もう！
jp.literal: Alright! I'll advance step by step, surely!
We're not done yet! This is just the beginning!

jp.text: ああ、この調子で行こう！

jp.literal: I'll break the deadlock from here!

557553723.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0700
557553723.transcript: I will keep the crew safe.

jp.literal: Heh heh... you're quite the sight.
There's no such thing as impossible!

jp.text: まだだ！ここから挽回する！
jp.literal: Not yet! I'll make a comeback from here!

568203314.label: PL0800_vo_DUO_rescue1_C_PL0900
568203314.transcript: Don't worry! I'm here for you!

jp.text: 安心しろ。俺がついてる。

570936579.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_win_2
570936579.transcript: Our armor is valor. Our strength our bond.

jp.text: これが俺たちの戦い方だ！
jp.literal: This is our way of fighting!

jp.text: レッドデデュネーション！

573990015.label: PL0800_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL0900_3
573990015.transcript: I'll hold them off! Get healing!

jp.text: 俺がおとりとなる！今のうちに回復を！
jp.literal: I'll be your bait. Recover your health now!

574366694.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1300
574366694.transcript: Do you mean to test me? So be it!

jp.text: さらに速くなるというのか。だが、食らいついてみせる！
jp.literal: You're saying you'll go even faster? I'll catch up to you!

574475396.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_C
574475396.transcript: The tyranny of Avia ends now!

586981703.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_NP0300
586981703.transcript: You're as good a jester as you are a soldier.

jp.text: 水臭いぞ、ローランドの。仲間同士じゃないか。
jp.literal: You're all wet, Rolan. We're comrades, aren't we?

jp.text: ああ、まだまだここからだ！
jp.literal: Ah, we've still got a long way to go!

jp.text: 大丈夫。まだこれからだ。
jp.literal: I'm fine. We're just getting started!

602085725.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1600
602085725.transcript: I need to improve my offense.

jp.text: さらなる高みを目指さなければ！
jp.literal: I must aim for even greater heights.

jp.text: ジークフリート、呼びかけ相手：ランスロット。場面：duo: recovery d。タスカリマシタ。
今の動きに合わせられたとは。
jp.literal: I was able to match your movements just now.

jp.text: ディアストロフィズム

621979393.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1500
621979393.transcript: My swords are rather like stingers, aren't they?

jp.text: このやり方が、俺の剣に向いているからな。

jp.literal: I won't let you get away!

630622213.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_FIRST
630622213.transcript: Open ranks! Don't let them flank us!

jp.text: 参戦開始！敵に囲まれないよう注意を！
jp.literal: Three times! Be careful not to get surrounded by enemies!

630629271.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL0400
630629271.transcript: Keep your staff at the ready.

jp.literal: Io-dono, let's prepare for what comes next.

633357243.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_B
633357243.transcript: Your sorcery is no obstacle, sword witch!

jp.text: 攻撃の手数ならば遅ればせまない！
jp.literal: If you're going to attack, you can't afford to hesitate!

635884271.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_6st_1_B
635884271.transcript: Send your strongest! It matters not!

jp.text: 束になって来ようとも！

650204284.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_C
650204284.transcript: Angra Mainyu! We will destroy you!

jp.text: アンラマイン！ここで破壊する！
jp.literal: I won't allow it! I'll destroy you here!

650697257.label: PL0800_vo_DUO_rescue2_A_PL0900_3
650697257.transcript: Once again, I'm in your debt.

jp.literal: Support in the rear, thank you.

jp.text: ここから挽回しましょう！
jp.literal: Let's turn the tide from here!

668153970.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_NP0300
668153970.transcript: Rolan, I'm at a loss for words.

jp.text: ローランドの、すごいな！

673825992.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0100
673825992.transcript: It is my duty to protect you.

jp.literal: I won't let you get away with that.

677302729.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_A
677302729.transcript: If you value your skydom, you will stand down!

jp.text: 先へ進ませてもらうぞ、将軍！
jp.literal: I'll go ahead and lead the way! Charge!

684436450.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0200
684436450.transcript: It came naturally. Our swordplay is so similar.

jp.text: コウリノケンギデマケルワケニワイカナイカラナ
jp.literal: I can't lose to you with my ice sword skills.

jp.text: ファイス！フリューゲル！
アークデトネーション！

688001567.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_3st_1_FIRST
688001567.transcript: They don't know who they've challenged! Show them!

jp.text: もうりょうめ、われらのじゃまはさせねえぞ！
jp.literal: I won't let you interfere with our plans!
I'll get out of the way!

jp.text: まだ油断はできないな
jp.literal: I still can't afford to let my guard down.

jp.text: ランスロット：カリオストロ、ノゾムトコロダ！

693332144.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_win_1
693332144.transcript: One blade for truth, one for honor!

jp.literal: With my sword, I shall carve a path!

697513997.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0600
697513997.transcript: I never thought wooden petal could hold up against frost and steel.

jp.text: 植物を使った攻撃か。実に面白い。
jp.literal: Using plants for attacks, huh? How utterly fascinating.

697777244.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0500
697777244.transcript: Does the river freeze by winter's kiss?

jp.text: 承知した！この双剣で期待に応えよう！
jp.literal: Understood. I'll meet your expectations with this sword.

701518119.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_A
701518119.transcript: This is no time to waver!

jp.text: 迷っている場合ではないな
jp.literal: This is no time to hesitate!

705353617.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_A
705353617.transcript: There is no foe we cannot topple!

jp.text: 勝てぬ相手ではないはずだ
jp.literal: There's no opponent I can't defeat!

708576212.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1000
708576212.transcript: Percival, as fierce a soldier as ever.

jp.text: 相変わらずの才だな、パーシヴァル。
jp.literal: Still the same old you, Percival.

jp.text: いつでもお相手しよう

709751661.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_5_FIRST
709751661.transcript: After all we've been through, we have nothing left to fear!

jp.text: この御言を読んで、我らは畏怖などしない！
jp.literal: We summon this omen. We will not falter.

jp.text: うぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅぅ
気を引き締めていこう
以前の俺たちと思わないことだ！
jp.literal: I can't believe this is the same group we used to be!

jp.text: 連携攻撃ならば、俺たちに分があるさ！
jp.literal: If it's a co-op attack, we've got this!
I'm grateful to the woman of the blade.
Let me take a little break.

jp.text: ショウキは逃がさない！行こう！
jp.literal: I won't let the opportunity slip away. Let's go!
Leave the next one to me!

jp.text: よし！一気に攻め込むぞ！
jp.literal: Alright! Let's rush in all at once!
Thanks. That was a big help.

jp.text: この力、無駄にはしません！
jp.literal: I won't let this power go to waste!

jp.text: ギャアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア
すまない、油断していたようだ
期待に応えてみせます！
jp.literal: I'll show you how to live up to your expectations!

jp.text: 連携がうまくいったな
ありがとうをございます！
アブソリュート・ゼロ！

772427063.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200
772427063.transcript: That could not have gone better.

776379725.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_B
776379725.transcript: I wage my honor as a knight!

780991741.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_2_C
780991741.transcript: Even obvious best won't stop us!

jp.text: ここまできて引くわけにはいかない！
jp.literal: I've come this far, I can't back down!

jp.text: ハァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァァ

784916471.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1100
784916471.transcript: Thank you. I'll work hard to meet your expectations.

jp.text: はい！常に学び、成長せねば！

jp.literal: Thanks to you, I can still fight.

791663230.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_win_9
791663230.transcript: After this, it's back to training.

jp.text: まだまだ。鍛錬あるのみだ！

793498836.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B
793498836.transcript: The tailwind of victory guides us!

jp.text: 勝利の風は我らに吹いているぞ！
jp.literal: The wind of victory blows for us!
Got a firm grip on it!

797609723.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0400
797609723.transcript: You're welcome to train with me anytime.

800040491.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL0500
800040491.transcript: A tried and true veteran indeed!

800589210.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1700
800589210.transcript: Well, your fighting style does resemble Vayne's after all.

jp.text: バザラガ、戦い方が少しヴェインと似ていて、合わせやすいな。
jp.literal: Your fighting style is a bit like Vane's, so we're easy to sync up.

jp.text: シルーナ！攻め続けるぞ！
jp.literal: Hold it! I'll keep pressing the attack!

jp.text: アースデトネーション！
この力、存分に振るおう！
jp.literal: Let's unleash this power to the fullest!
I'll charge them all at once!

824391093.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_win_7
824391093.transcript: What's hardship but a chance to grow?

jp.text: また一歩、成長できたな。
jp.literal: One step further. I've grown again.

825133976.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1900
825133976.transcript: Would you like me to teach you?

jp.text: えっ、興味があるなら手ほどきしても構わないが？
jp.literal: If you're interested, I don't mind letting you have it.

825765455.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL1300
825765455.transcript: True. Perhaps I should take up the rod.

jp.text: 確かにな。今度、訓練課程に釣りを加えてみるか。
jp.literal: You're right. Next time, let's add fishing to the training regimen.

828580578.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_1_FIRST
828580578.transcript: You don't stand a chance against us!

jp.text: どんな相手であれ、怯みはしない！
jp.literal: No matter the opponent, I will never yield!
I can't go on like this...

832214841.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_FIRST
832214841.transcript: Unity shall guide us! Victory is assured!

jp.text: 絆の力か…。なんと心地よく、力強い！
jp.literal: Is this the power of bonds? How pleasant... and strong!
I must hurry to rescue you!

jp.text: 攻撃は通用するようだな
jp.literal: Looks like my attacks are effective.

837034010.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3
837034010.transcript: Never was there a greater crew!

jp.text: みんなの力があってこそだ！

840986490.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1100
840986490.transcript: There is no honor greater than fighting by your side.

jp.text: ジークフリートさんと共に戦えて光栄です！
jp.literal: It's an honor to fight alongside you, Siegfried.

jp.text: それにしても不気味な塔だ

848145823.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
848145823.transcript: You would've done the same for me.

jp.literal: I'll return to the front lines!

852489826.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_A
852489826.transcript: Bear witness to the might of my twin fangs!

jp.text: 我が双剣の神髄を見よ！
jp.literal: Behold the essence of my swordsmanship!

856799669.label: PL0800_vo_NAV_throw_spear_reaction_1
856799669.transcript: That was heavier than Siegfried's sword!

jp.text: 重量はジークフリートさんの剣以上か！
jp.literal: Is it heavier than Siegfried's sword?

857042534.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
857042534.transcript: Now! Let's bring this behemoth down!

jp.text: 急所は押さえた！観念してもらおうか！
jp.literal: I've secured the weak point. Shall I let you have a taste of my mercy?

858273545.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_fullchain
858273545.transcript: Couldn't ask for a better crew!

859739197.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0300
859739197.transcript: It feels as if we're old comrades.

jp.literal: Hmph... Let's call it a day.

jp.text: アマカケル！ハクリュウノヤイバトチエ！
jp.literal: I'll cover you! With the blade of Hakuryuu!

jp.text: ここから巻き返してみせます！
jp.literal: I'll turn this around from here!

866078530.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_FIRST
866078530.transcript: If you truly are a general, then you shall have no trouble deflecting my twin fangs!

jp.text: ガランツァ将軍とやら、我が双剣よ捉えられるかな！
jp.literal: General Gallanza, can you capture my swordsmanship?

jp.text: お、おかげで助かりました！

869451716.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_FIRST
869451716.transcript: This wind is more sinister than I remember.

jp.text: この風、以前合体した時とは違う
jp.literal: This wind... it's different from when we met before.

jp.text: ライデンのエラディケート！
パーシヴァル！大丈夫か！？
さあ、このまま攻め続けるぞ！

880986654.label: PL0800_vo_ETC_lockon_4
880986654.transcript: Witness the fangs of the white dragon!

jp.text: リュウの騎士の力！お見せしよう！
jp.literal: The power of the Dragon Knight! Let me show you!

888502239.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_NP0300
888502239.transcript: It was like you read my mind!

jp.text: 今のタイミングで合わせられるとは
jp.literal: I can't believe we're syncing up at this timing.

891049141.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1000
891049141.transcript: Fighting side by side, just like the old days.

jp.text: よし！確実に効いてるぞ！
ありがとうございます。ジークフリートさん。

897901487.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_C
897901487.transcript: Victory is at hand! Seize it!

jp.text: 今だが勝負の分かれ目だ！
jp.literal: Now's the time to decide the outcome!

jp.text: みんな、足場にだけは注意してくれ！
jp.literal: Everyone, just be careful of the floor!

911728873.label: PL0800_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL0900_2
911728873.transcript: I couldn't ask for a greater companion.

jp.text: ヴェインにはいつも助けられてばかりだな
jp.literal: I always end up being the one who gets saved by Vane.

jp.text: リンク支援に感謝する
jp.literal: Thank you for the link support.
I'm sorry. I'm glad you're okay.

920704959.label: PL0800_vo_DUO_buff_E_PL0900
920704959.transcript: I'll make fine use of this!

920740304.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_7st_1_A
920740304.transcript: Whatever darkness lies here, we shall face it!

jp.text: 何が相手であろうとも俺たちは！
jp.literal: No matter who the opponent is, we'll...

925327293.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_FIRST
925327293.transcript: One final challenge! Face it proudly!

jp.text: ここが終局か…やるしかない！
jp.literal: So this is the end... I have no choice but to do it!

936496150.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1400
936496150.transcript: Perhaps I should redouble my training.

jp.text: 俺も負けていられないな
jp.literal: I can't afford to lose either.

937029971.label: PL0800_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1000_3
937029971.transcript: I'll fend them off until you've recovered!

jp.text: お前が立て直すまで援護する！
jp.literal: I'll cover you until you regroup!

jp.text: グレンノクルプション！

jp.literal: Don't let up on the offense!

963658808.label: PL0800_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL0900_2
963658808.transcript: Get to the back lines! Quickly!

965165282.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_3_FIRST
965165282.transcript: And so, the final Obviath general graces us. On guard!

jp.text: アヴィア三章、最後の一人か。どう出てくる。
jp.literal: Avia Sancho, the last one? Show me what you've got!

969790757.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1500
969790757.transcript: Truly, experience in the field guides us.

jp.text: ガンダゴウザ殿のおかげだ

972260763.label: PL0800_vo_ETC_quest_start_2
972260763.transcript: The white dragon unfurls its wings. Come!

jp.text: 誇り高きリュウの名にかけて！ マイル！
jp.literal: In the name of the proud dragon, I charge!

973821350.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1100
973821350.transcript: You're in a class of your own.

jp.text: さすがです！ジークフリートさん！

jp.literal: Alright, let's get ready for the fight!

jp.text: ありがとう、ロゼッタ殿。

989599445.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1800
989599445.transcript: I know. A single moment can mean life or death.

jp.text: ああ、一瞬の油断が命取りだからな。
jp.literal: Ah... a moment's carelessness could cost you your life.

993761437.label: PL0800_vo_NAV_dmg_reaction_PL1100_3
993761437.transcript: Get behind me! I'll be your shield!

jp.text: ここは俺が前に出ます！

994971361.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0400
994971361.transcript: Not at all. We look out for each other.

jp.text: 当然のことをしたまでだ
jp.literal: I did what was only natural.

997176708.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
997176708.transcript: Of course. Leave the close combat to me.

jp.text: 問題ない。このまま前衛は任せてもらおう。
jp.literal: No problem. I'll take the lead from here.

jp.text: ジークフリート、無理はしないでください！
意思なき攻撃など通用しない！

1000745868.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300
1000745868.transcript: Let's perfect this stratagem as we go.

jp.text: ラカム殿。このまま調子を上げていこう！
jp.literal: Rackam-dono, let's keep the momentum going!

1001838744.label: PL0800_vo_DUO_rescue2_C_PL1100
1001838744.transcript: I'm not out for the count yet!

jp.literal: I'm not done yet! I can still go!
This time, I won't be late!

1008321662.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_NP0300
1008321662.transcript: Let us bring peace to the skies together.

jp.text: ああ、気合を入れて行こう！

1011890441.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_multi_talk2_A_3
1011890441.transcript: Agreed! I felt proud of that one!

jp.text: 次はもっと精度を上げよう
jp.literal: Let's raise the accuracy next time.

jp.text: 仲間として当然のことをしたまでだ。
jp.literal: I did what was only natural as a comrade.

1013884630.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_2_FIRST
1013884630.transcript: Take heed! We face experienced fighters!

jp.text: この動き、相当な手だれのようだ。
jp.literal: This movement... it's quite the display of skill.

1021216779.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_8st_1_B
1021216779.transcript: We face destruction itself! But we shall not shrink!

jp.text: カミノケシンデアロートモオクシタリワシナイ
jp.literal: Even if I am a manifestation of God, I will not yield!

jp.text:
来てくれ！
こっちだ！
必ず食い止めてみせる！

jp.literal: Got a good grip on it!

1026577741.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_win_10
1026577741.transcript: By my blades, I'll see peace restored!

jp.text: 俺の剣は、伊達ではないぞ！
jp.literal: My sword is no mere ornament!

jp.text: 何の？次も合わせて見せよ！
jp.literal: What? Show me your next move too!

jp.text: ああ、息が合っていたな

1035534147.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_NP0300
1035534147.transcript: As do astrals. Well, I suppose that's obvious, isn't it?

jp.text: あなたこそ、その洗練された剣、参考にさせてもらうよ。
jp.literal: You too, let me take reference from your refined sword.

jp.text: ウーアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア
エアロデトネーション！

1063781925.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_2st_1_B
1063781925.transcript: General Gallanza! I recommend you retreat!

jp.text: 邪魔をしないでもらおう！ガランツァ将軍！
jp.literal: Don't get in my way! Gallanza Shogun!

jp.text: 手当て完了だ、ヴェイン！

1064354097.label: PL0800_vo_NAV_enemy_overdrive_reaction_B
1064354097.transcript: Keep your eyes trained on them!

jp.text: カクジ！敵から目を離すな！
jp.literal: Everyone! Keep your eyes off the enemy!
That technique just now was amazing.

1067995457.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_1_B
1067995457.transcript: Hold steady! Find its weakness and push through!

jp.text: まだだ！隙を見て畳み掛けるんだ！
jp.literal: I'm not done yet! I'll take advantage of the opening and sweep you away!

1068197165.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_rampage
1068197165.transcript: It's simple once you understand the strategy.

jp.text: ふっ、なんてことはないさ。

1650256.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1400
1650256.transcript: Watching you fight is entrancing... like a dream.

jp.text: コチョウを纏う剣の舞、なんと幻想的な
jp.literal: The sword's blade, wrapped in a halo... how fantastic!
What the hell are you doing?!

35219868.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2500
35219868.transcript: Well, I am fortified by the support of your magicked blades!

jp.text: マケンの動きに合わせ、さらなる一閃を叩き込む！
jp.literal: I'll sync my movements with your blade and strike an even fiercer blow!

45832659.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2800
45832659.transcript: A knight is only as skilled as his allies.

jp.text: フラーの連撃もなかなかのものだ
jp.literal: Fraud's combo attacks are quite something.

47782206.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2700
47782206.transcript: We've still further heights to climb.

jp.text: まだまだ修行中の身さ
jp.literal: You're still a trainee, aren't you?

55068346.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1900
55068346.transcript: The white dragon knights never disappoint!

jp.literal: This is the White Dragon's ultimate move!

78015099.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2700
78015099.transcript: You give me far too much credit, my friend.

jp.text: それはさすがに持ち上げすぎだ、ユーステス殿。
jp.literal: That's a bit too much to lift, Eustace.

100216558.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2900
100216558.transcript: I shall take that as praise.

jp.text: 褒め言葉として受け取っておこう
jp.literal: I'll take that as a compliment.

124926636.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1100
124926636.transcript: It's coming along, but still needs polish.

jp.text: まだまだ、精進あるのみです！
jp.literal: Still got a long way to go!

125975919.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2800
125975919.transcript: I will not falter, lest I besmirch Fiendrock's good name.

jp.text: フェンドラヘの名にかけて、失態は許されない！
jp.literal: I swear on the name of Phaedra, failure is not an option!

179716659.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2700
179716659.transcript: You do not miss. Carry on.

jp.text: ユーステス、刹那に開けた射線を逃さなかったか？
jp.literal: You didn't miss that fleeting line of fire, did you?

183190791.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1700
183190791.transcript: Your force of will is terrifying!

jp.text: 味方すら怯むような、凄まじいプレッシャーだ！
jp.literal: Even my allies are turning away. This is incredible pressure.

199349158.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1200
199349158.transcript: Witness the might of two knight captains!

jp.text: 素晴らしい連携だった！シャルロッテ殿！
jp.literal: That was a splendid combination, Charlotta.

jp.text: 援護に感謝する！ガランツァ殿！
jp.literal: I thank you for your support, Lord Gallanza.

251560420.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2700
251560420.transcript: Thank you for lending your assistance.

jp.text: ユーステス殿、追撃に感謝を！
jp.literal: Thanks for the follow-up attack, Eustace!

262022625.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0700
262022625.transcript: Your pets paved me a path!

jp.text: みんなが道を開いてくれたおかげさ
jp.literal: Thanks to everyone who cleared the way for me.

279219264.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0100
279219264.transcript: Oh, you had the time to stop and appreciate my handiwork?

jp.text: ランスロット：ダンチョウは余裕なようだな
jp.literal: Looks like you've got this one covered.

281528496.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2900
281528496.transcript: It has taken years to hone my technique.

jp.text: 頼もしい戦友がいるからこそ、俺たちには勝利があるんだ。
jp.literal: A true V-caster only comes from relentless training.

290573018.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2200
290573018.transcript: Your avatars are as fearsome as they are mysterious.

jp.text: 剣神か…理解が及ばないが、凄まじいな！
jp.literal: Awakening? I can't fully understand, but it's incredible.

295514089.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2500
295514089.transcript: Well, Princess of the Veil, let us continue this ball elsewhere.

jp.text: パーティの続きと参りましょう。鋼の姫君。
jp.literal: Let's continue the party, Princess of Agathen.

jp.text: 承知した。マギラフリラ殿。

300603681.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1400
300603681.transcript: Yes. One must persevere in the face of adversity.

jp.text: その言葉に恥じぬよう、これからも精進を重ねよう。
jp.literal: Let us begin anew. Let us continue to strive together.

318871648.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1600
318871648.transcript: What enemy can withstand the might of your spear?

jp.text: この光の熱、敵は一たまりもないだろ！
jp.literal: This heat of light... the enemy won't stand a chance!

321105409.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2600
321105409.transcript: Her style is rather erratic and wild, but I may yet learn something.

jp.text: 何とも破天荒な剣術だな。だが、学びも得られそうだ。
jp.literal: What an audacious swordplay. But I suppose I can learn something from it.

325261143.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2200
325261143.transcript: As a fellow leader, you honor me with your words, Star-Sword Sovereign.

jp.text: シエテ殿にそう言っていただけると、白龍騎士団団長としての面目も立つというもの。
jp.literal: If you say so, Seofon, then I suppose I can rest easy as the commander of the White Dragon Knights.

jp.text: 後方からの追撃、助かった！
jp.literal: I'm glad you came to my aid from the rear!

376123612.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2500
376123612.transcript: May I ask how you control so many swords at once?

jp.text: ふむ、魔剣は何本まで操れるのだろうか。
jp.literal: Hmph. How many cursed swords can you control?

395865656.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2400
395865656.transcript: No matter how oft I bear witness, your strength is a sight to behold!

jp.text: 分かってはいたが、改めて驚かされる領力だ。
jp.literal: I knew it, but I'm still amazed at your power.

413964417.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2400
413964417.transcript: I have a dear friend with a similar fighting style. Yes, let's go with that.

jp.text: 似た獲物を扱う友がいるから、といったところかな。
jp.literal: I was just about to say that I have a friend who deals with similar things.

415597364.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2800
415597364.transcript: A peculiar assessment, but I'll accept it.

jp.text: その感想は意外だが、なるほどな。
jp.literal: That assessment is surprising, but I see.

417864561.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2800
417864561.transcript: I thank you for your support.

jp.text: フラウドの援護に感謝
jp.literal: Flaude, thank you for the support!

426137388.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1500
426137388.transcript: Seems I've bested Ghandagoza's fire... for now.

jp.text: ガンダゴウザ殿の熱気には負けてはいられないからな！
jp.literal: I can't afford to lose to Ghandagoza's passion.

438760405.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2400
438760405.transcript: How heartening that you are now our ally.

jp.text: ガランツァ殿、味方となると頼もしい限りだ。
jp.literal: Gallanza-dono, you're reliable as an ally.

439859494.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2400
439859494.transcript: Our speed and swiftness not one and the same? No matter. Let us race!

jp.text: スピードと早さは同じでは…と、とにかく、臨むところだ！
jp.literal: Speed and swiftness are the same, aren't they? Anyway, I'm counting on you!

449109078.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2800
449109078.transcript: I've much to learn from fighting alongside a martial artist.

jp.text: なるほど。格闘術との連携は学びが多いな。
jp.literal: I see. There's a lot to learn from combining with martial arts.

449643816.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2700
449643816.transcript: As they say, it takes one to know one.

jp.text: お互い様だと言っておこう
jp.literal: Heh heh... Let's just say we're even.

jp.text: 心強いよ、ユーステス殿。

459443471.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2500
459443471.transcript: We must prepare for the next fight!

jp.literal: Alright, let's prepare for what comes next.

460744978.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1800
460744978.transcript: You're one of the best, Cagliostro!

jp.text: さすがはカリオストロ殿だな

489311377.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0600
489311377.transcript: And yet, they pale against your roses.

jp.text: ロゼッタ殿の奥義こそ
機転が利くな、オイゲンだろ！
jp.literal: Your starting point is solid, Eugen.

500308749.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2600
500308749.transcript: I can lend you a dagger if you'd like.

jp.text: ならば、今度試してみるか。
jp.literal: Then... shall we give it a try this time?

jp.text: まさかそうくるとは。恐れ入った
jp.literal: Heh heh... I never thought it'd come to this. I'm afraid I'm going to have to say it.

542082509.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL2100
542082509.transcript: I am fueled by the support of my comrades... and my kingdom!

jp.text: 我が武芸は仲間と祖国のために！
jp.literal: My blade is for my comrades and my homeland!

jp.text: 承知した！ベアトリクス殿！

566433805.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2600
566433805.transcript: Grateful to have your aid, Beatrix!

jp.text: 感謝する！ベアトリクス殿！

jp.literal: That was a perfect follow-up attack.

568364716.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0300
568364716.transcript: I've dabbled in my spare time.

jp.text: 氷の双剣に、これだけではない！
jp.literal: Ice blade, I'll show you what I've got!
I won't let you get away with that!

jp.text: パーシヴァル！次も任せられるか？
jp.literal: Percival, can I count on you again?

578915493.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2900
578915493.transcript: Yes, but knighthood is so much more.

jp.text: ああ、これが俺の騎士道だ！
jp.literal: Ah, this is my knight's way!

586100950.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1300
586100950.transcript: You've yet to see my swiftest pace!

jp.text: もっと速度を上げてみせましょう！
jp.literal: Let's show you how fast we can go!

605867726.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0700
605867726.transcript: That could not have gone better!

jp.text: 見事だった！フェリだろ！ペットたち！
jp.literal: That was amazing, Ferry and the pets!

624753106.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2400
624753106.transcript: I fear I still have much to prove with these dual blades of mine.

jp.text: 我が双剣にも引けを取らないことを証明しなければな！
jp.literal: I must prove that my swordsmanship is no less than yours.

630440383.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2700
630440383.transcript: And you fry them to a crisp!

jp.text: 稲妻のごとく待ってみせよ
jp.literal: Lightning-like, just you wait and see!

642688015.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2900
642688015.transcript: The might of the wedge of darkness!

jp.text: これが六竜の刻の力か
jp.literal: So this is... the dark power of the Six Dragons?

643425580.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1800
643425580.transcript: I hope I'm never on the receiving end of her alchemy.

jp.text: カリオストロ殿の錬金術も見事だった
いいスピードをしているな
jp.literal: You're moving at a good speed.

693213636.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL1300
693213636.transcript: I see I've yet speed to gain.

jp.text: 早いな。俺もまだまだか。
jp.literal: You're fast. I still have a long way to go.

724163102.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2800
724163102.transcript: Think nothing of it. I'll take the vanguard for the next fight.

jp.text: 構わない。次は俺がリードしよう。
jp.literal: It's fine. I'll take the lead from now on.

754072294.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0500
754072294.transcript: Fast? That was my medium pace.

jp.text: まだまだこんなものでは！
jp.literal: Not even close to being enough!

791096938.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL0900
791096938.transcript: One of the few occasions I have time to clean!

jp.text: お前がいるから本気を出せるんだ
jp.literal: I can go all out because you're here.

794041444.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2400
794041444.transcript: How are your strikes so ferocious yet precise?

jp.text: なんて豪快で正確な一撃なんだ！
jp.literal: What a bold and accurate strike!

824773345.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2900
824773345.transcript: It's a lofty title, but one to which I must endeavor.

jp.text: その名に恥じぬよう、精進を続けると、この剣に誓おう！
jp.literal: I shall not disgrace that name. I will continue to strive. I swear it on this sword!

827716753.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL0200
827716753.transcript: Shall we freeze our next foe solid?

jp.text: このまま相手を凍り付けにするのはどうだろうか
jp.literal: How about freezing the enemy solid like this?

jp.text: さすがはガンダゴウザ殿だ

853322831.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2500
853322831.transcript: Thank you for your aid, Lady Maglielle.

jp.text: 支援に感謝する！マギラフリラ殿！
jp.literal: I'm grateful for your support, Maglielle.
A single blow that strikes the cause and effect...?

898733376.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL2900
898733376.transcript: Fediel, I thank you for your aid!

jp.text: フェディエル殿、女力に感謝を
jp.literal: Fediel, thank you for your support.

916796254.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2400
916796254.transcript: I, Captain of the White Dragons, cannot be beaten!

jp.text: 白龍騎士団の団長として、負けられないな！
jp.literal: As the commander of the White Dragon Knights, I can't afford to lose.

jp.text: いい技を持っているな、イド。
jp.literal: You've got some nice moves, Id.

931845533.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2800
931845533.transcript: A perfect display if ever there were!

jp.text: 今のは完璧な連携だった！
俺たちの敵じゃあないな！

954659287.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2300
954659287.transcript: You hit the mark from such a distance?

jp.text: あの距離から射抜くとは
jp.literal: To break through from that distance...

974236024.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1200
974236024.transcript: Our joint training sessions are paying dividends.

jp.text: シャルロッテ殿との合同演習の成果だな。
jp.literal: The fruits of our joint training with you, Charlotta.

jp.text: タケレ！ハクリュウのケン！
jp.literal: Blade Impulse! Kaltzwinger! Lawinensturm! Blauer Dolch! Turbulenz! Southern Cross! Schwertgeist! Luftspiegelung! Weissfluegel!

1039632048.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk1_PL2100
1039632048.transcript: Your divine protection makes us unstoppable!

jp.text: 天使の加護があれば、敵なしだ！
jp.literal: With the Angel's Cage, there's no enemy!

jp.text: よし！このまま畳みかけるぞ！
jp.literal: Alright! I'll keep pressing the advantage!

jp.text: 正確無比。怖いほどに的確な攻撃だった。
jp.literal: Inaccurate... it was an attack so precise it was frightening.

1067101550.label: PL0800_vo_SP_burst_reaction_talk2_PL1700
1067101550.transcript: Hm. Should the need arise, I shall avail you.

jp.text: フムム。状況次第では甘えさせてもらおう。
jp.literal: Hmph. Depending on the situation, I might just let you have your way.

jp.text: これくらい、お安い御用です！
jp.literal: That's about it. It's quite a bargain.

63877097.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2200
63877097.transcript: May I have your aid on the next assault?

jp.text: 次も当てにさせてもらいます。シエテ殿。
jp.literal: I'll take the next hit for you, Seofon.

69890549.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2200
69890549.transcript: Yes! We shall drive them back!

jp.text: よし！このまま攻勢をかける！
jp.literal: Alright! Let's keep up the offensive!

jp.text: 援護に感謝する、ソーン殿。
jp.literal: I'm grateful for your support, Thorne.

jp.text: 紛れもなく最高の一撃でした
jp.literal: That was a perfect strike, without a single flaw.

387497587.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_3
387497587.transcript: Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah!

jp.text: ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……くっ……く
jp.literal: Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah!

410809527.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2300
410809527.transcript: A knight must work in concert with his allies. I can offer you that much at least.

jp.text: 騎空士としての連携には慣れてるからな。次も任せてくれ。
jp.literal: As a knight, I'm used to working together. Leave the next one to me.

413186213.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2200
413186213.transcript: It's an honor to have your trust, Seofon.

jp.text: シエテ殿に認められるとは、光栄です。
jp.literal: To be acknowledged by you, Seofon... I'm honored.

530900002.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_abs_1
530900002.transcript: Ready... one... two... three... four... five... six... Hah!

jp.text:
いくぞ！
一
二
三
四
五
六
へっ

Alright, let's prepare for what comes next!

629166821.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2300
629166821.transcript: Of course! I shall hold nothing back!

jp.text: ああ、次も必ず決めてみせる！
jp.literal: I'll definitely land the next one too!

660244484.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_squat_1
660244484.transcript: One! Two! Three! Four! Five! Six!

jp.literal: One, two, three, four, five, six.

707783583.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_squat_3
707783583.transcript: Hah... Nngh... Hmph... Nngh... Hah... Nngh... Hmph... Nngh... Hah... Nngh...

jp.literal: Hah... Hah... Hah... Hah... Hah... Hah... Hah...

725966020.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_pushup_1
725966020.transcript: Let's begin. One. Two. Three. Four. Five. Six. Excellent.

jp.text: 始めるか。一、二、三、四、五、六。よし。
jp.literal: Let's begin. One, two, three, four, five, six. Alright!

jp.text: はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ…はぁ
jp.literal: Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah! Hah!

821735793.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2300
821735793.transcript: Absurd. You're the greatest archer in the sky realm.

jp.text: そちらこそ、さすがは全空一の弓の使い手だ。
jp.literal: You too. You're truly the number one archer in the sky.

899067938.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL2200
899067938.transcript: There can be no mercy on the battlefield.

jp.literal: Heh. If that's what you wish.

982091421.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL2300
982091421.transcript: The depth of your skill saves us yet again.

jp.text: 全空一の弓の支援、恐れいる
jp.literal: Support from the bow in the sky, I'm counting on you.

jp.text: ああ、遠慮は無用だ、サンダルフォン。
jp.literal: Ah, no need to hold back, Sandalphon.

323633061.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL2100
323633061.transcript: Sandalphon, are you ready for the next assault?

jp.text: サンダルフォン、次も追撃を頼んでもいいか？
jp.literal: Sandalphon, can I count on you for another barrage?

jp.text:
へへっ、はっ！  
しゅしゅっ！  
へへっ、はっ！
jp.literal: Heh heh! Hah! Shh shh! Heh heh! Hah!

jp.text: エイ！エイ！オオオオオオ！

jp.literal: For the pride of my father!

621620752.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL2100
621620752.transcript: Wow, coming from the supreme primarch himself, I am honored.

jp.text: その褒め言葉、ありがたく受け取っておくよ。

642900770.label: PL0800_vo_CMM_emo_boxing_3
642900770.transcript: Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh! Huh!

785257193.label: PL0800_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL2100
785257193.transcript: And they never shall so long as I have any say in the matter.
